name: ICICI MakeMyTrip Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹1,50,000 in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 10X myBizPoints on MakeMyTrip bookings (flights, hotels, holidays)
2X myBizPoints per ₹100 spent on all other retail purchases

redemptionOptions: MakeMyTrip vouchers (best value at ~₹0.50 per point)

welcomeBenefits.condition: On payment of joining fee and first transaction

additionalBenefits: Higher point value when redeemed as MMT vouchers (~₹0.50)
4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year
pros: 10X rewards on MakeMyTrip bookings is excellent for frequent travellers
Higher point value when redeemed on MMT (up to ₹0.50 per point)
₹1,000 MMT welcome voucher covers joining fee twice over
4X rewards on dining is a solid bonus category
cons: Best value locked to MakeMyTrip platform only
Base reward rate of 0.50% on general spends is average
High foreign currency markup at 3.5% despite being a travel card
idealFor: Frequent travellers who regularly book through MakeMyTrip
Users who want travel-focused rewards with domestic lounge access
Those who prefer a low-fee co-branded travel card

faqs.question: How do the 10X rewards on MakeMyTrip work?
faqs.answer: When you make any booking on MakeMyTrip (flights, hotels, holiday packages) using this card, you earn 10 myBizPoints per ₹100 instead of the standard 2. These points can be redeemed on MMT at a higher value of approximately ₹0.50 per point, giving an effective return of about 5%.

faqs.question: Can I redeem myBizPoints outside MakeMyTrip?
faqs.answer: Yes, myBizPoints can be redeemed through the PAYBACK catalogue, as gift vouchers, or as statement credit. However, the best value (~₹0.50 per point) is achieved when redeeming as MakeMyTrip vouchers. Other redemptions give approximately ₹0.25 per point.

faqs.question: Is this card good for international travel?
faqs.answer: While the 10X MMT rewards work for international flight and hotel bookings, the 3.5% foreign currency markup makes it poor for actual international spending. Consider pairing it with a low-forex card for overseas transactions.

faqs.question: How does the welcome voucher work?
faqs.answer: You receive a ₹1,000 MakeMyTrip voucher after paying the joining fee and making your first transaction. The voucher can be applied to any booking on MakeMyTrip with minimum booking conditions as specified by MMT.
